title: Wagamama
description: I led a cross-functional team of 30+ from inception through strategy, build and launch of a consumer loyalty proposition and mobile app, owning discovery, proposition design and the loyalty mechanic itself, including a web-wrapped payment flow.
dominantCaption: people signed up, and ranked №1 iOS app in Food & Drink at launch.

challenge.body: Wagamama had no loyalty scheme while its rivals did. They needed to lift visit frequency and build a relationship with guests beyond the four walls of the restaurant, but there was no proven model for what loyalty should even mean for a brand built on food and hospitality.

approach.body:
I started with discovery to set the loyalty strategy, rather than jumping straight to features. We ran dual-track agile with heavy user research, and chose a flexible content platform so the product could keep evolving after launch.

The insight that shaped everything was to design the loyalty loop around the real in-restaurant moment: check in at your table, earn a stamp, redeem a reward, all while you are actually there.

images.alt: Soul Club how-it-works screen explaining how stamps are collected
images.caption: The loop, explained in the app: collect stamps, then redeem rewards.

whatWeBuilt.body:
I led a cross-functional team of 30+ from inception, and owned the proposition design and the loyalty mechanic itself. Soul Club is a check-in flow tied to your restaurant and table, a stamp-based rewards engine with redemption and minimum-spend logic, a content-led feed of recipes, events and editorial, and an ordering and split-bill flow with a web-wrapped payment journey.

The app launched around nine months after build began.

images.alt: Soul Club app home screen showing rewards, check-in and content
images.caption: The club home: rewards, content and check-in in one place.

images.alt: Check-in screen selecting the restaurant and table number
images.caption: Check in at your table to start earning.

images.alt: Rewards wallet showing an available reward ready to redeem
images.caption: Rewards live in a wallet, ready to redeem.

images.alt: Your order screen with reward redemption, stamp logic and split bill
images.caption: Redeem, order and split the bill in one flow.

images.alt: Soul Club event details screen for an in-restaurant event
images.caption: Events and content give a reason to come back.

outcomes.body: Soul Club launched at **№1 on the iOS App Store for Food & Drink**. Over a million people signed up in the first nine months, and visit frequency rose **58%** after launch. Floor staff folded check-in into the way they welcomed guests to the table, so the product became part of the actual dining ritual rather than a separate app.

learnings.body: Loyalty is not points, it is a reason to come back. The content feed drove incremental visits as much as the rewards did. And designing for the physical table moment, instead of a generic loyalty app, is what made people actually use it.
